reviews.comment:
Siempre que puedo paro a desayunar, muy buen desayuno y atencion de los chicos a cargo del  bar, muy rico Cafe y facturas, ademas si sos socio del ACA , te llevas un descuento extra.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever I can, I stop for breakfast. It's a very good breakfast and the staff at the bar are very attentive. The coffee and pastries are delicious, and if you're an ACA member, you get an extra discount.
